'''Poldts''' were lanky [[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] bipeds that superficially bore some resemblance to [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] and the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Poldts were skinny, long-snouted [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] who had thin [[Limb/Legends|limbs]], a flattened head.<ref name="HYP" /> Because of their lanky appearance, they bore a superficial resemblance to the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]],<ref name="TPMn" /> while their heads more closely resembled<ref name="HYP" /> that of the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]], an [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] species from [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].<ref name="AOC">{{Film|II}}</ref>

==Poldt in the galaxy==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], a [[Gender/Legends|male]] Poldt named [[Fanta]] was on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], visiting the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] on the occasion of [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|that year's]] [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]]. He had a quarrel with a Gungan named [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], who constantly tried to look over his shoulder to peek at his hand-held [[Viewscreen/Legends|viewscreen]].<ref name="TPMn" />

==Behind the scenes==
Their appearance was based on early concept art for the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]].

==Appearances==
